title: Malty Springy Polish Beef Brisket Stew
description: A hearty Polish stew featuring beef brisket, malty flavors, and springy vegetables, perfect for a crowd, this dish is also ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly. It is a comforting and satisfying meal for any occasion.
instructions: In a large pot, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the beef chunks and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced onions, carrots, potatoes, and celery, and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the malt syrup, beef broth, thyme, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours.
Remove the pot from the heat and let the stew cool slightly.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze the stew for later use, if desired.
